_comment: Authoritative JSON-RPC 2.0 / MCP tool schema for toRustCalcMCP, emitted by the server. Transport: newline-delimited JSON-RPC over stdio.

tools.description: Evaluate an arbitrary-precision calc expression (exact rational arithmetic) and return the result. Supports + - * / // % ^, comparisons, variables, and builtin functions such as sqrt, gcd, fact, isprime, sin, pi.

digits.description: Decimal digits shown in real mode (default 20). This call only.

epsilon.description: Precision target for irrational results, e.g. "1e-40". This call only.

expression.description: The expression to evaluate, e.g. "2^100 + 1" or "sqrt(2)" or "gcd(462,1071)". Multiple statements may be separated by ';'.

mode.description: Output rendering: 'real' decimal (default), 'frac' exact a/b, or 'int' truncated integer. Applies to this call only.

tools.name: calc_eval
tools.title: Evaluate calc expression

tools.description: Read or update the persistent session configuration (precision epsilon, display digits, output mode).

action.description: 'get' returns current config; 'set' updates one or more fields.

tools.name: calc_config
tools.title: Get or set session configuration

tools.description: List the available builtin functions with signatures and descriptions, optionally filtered by a substring.

filter.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to match against function names.

tools.name: calc_functions
tools.title: List builtin functions
